"# CareerForge - Database and Auth Migration

The current codebase has been developed using a local JSON database (`src/db/local-db.ts`) and a custom/placeholder authentication flow. Your initial request specified using **PostgreSQL with Neon DB, Drizzle ORM**, and **Clerk or Auth.js** for authentication.

To fulfill your requirements for a production-ready SaaS, we need to migrate the existing architecture to the requested tech stack.

## User Review Required

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> The codebase currently uses `local-db.ts` (a local JSON file) for data persistence. This was likely done for rapid prototyping. Do you approve migrating all the data models (Users, Profiles, Portfolios, etc.) to **Neon DB using Drizzle ORM**?
